article_meta.title: Media Assistant AG puts Don Lemon 'on notice' over Minnesota church protest

reasoning: No attribution violations and one solid catch (mind reading), but multiple mislabels (using Slant where Mind Reading/Subjective Adjectives fit better) and at least one notable missed instance of author-level motive attribution.

custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Misapplied Slant to items better labeled as Subjective Qualifying Adjectives/Word Choice and Mind Reading; only the second item’s label fits well.
